name: Number 101: Silent Honor ARK
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｎｏ．</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ナンバーズ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>１０１ <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｓ・Ｈ・Ａｒｋ Ｋｎｉｇｈｔ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>サイレント・オナーズ・アーク・ナイト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_rom: Nanbāzu Hyakuichi Sairento Onāzu Āku Naito
desc:
2 Level 4 monsters
You can detach 2 materials from this card, then target 1 Special Summoned monster your opponent controls in face-up Attack Position; attach it to this card as material. You can only use this effect of "Number 101: Silent Honor ARK" once per turn. If this face-up card on the field would be destroyed by battle or card effect, you can detach 1 material from this card instead.

sets.set: Premium Gold: Return of the Bling

action: Detaches multiple Xyz Materials as cost
Attaches from your opponent's field as Xyz Material

summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
